semantic.role: Defines the core business logic and domain entities for the ArchSpine system
responsibilities: Houses business logic independent of external frameworks or infrastructure
Defines fundamental data structures and interfaces used across the application
Ensures domain invariants are maintained regardless of data access methods

English.purpose: This document describes the `src/domain` folder, which serves as the architectural core of the ArchSpine system. It establishes the boundary where pure business logic and domain entities live, isolated from external dependencies.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for developers and architects who need to understand where core business rules and data structures are defined. It is relevant for anyone contributing to or maintaining the domain layer of the ArchSpine system.
key_takeaways: The domain folder contains business logic that is framework-agnostic
It defines the fundamental data structures and interfaces used across the application
Domain invariants are enforced here, independent of how data is accessed or stored

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档描述了 `src/domain` 文件夹，它是 ArchSpine 系统的架构核心。该文件夹划定了纯业务逻辑和领域实体的边界，使其与外部依赖隔离。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向需要了解核心业务规则和数据结构定义位置的开发者和架构师。适用于任何为 ArchSpine 系统领域层做出贡献或进行维护的人员。
key_takeaways: 领域文件夹包含与框架无关的业务逻辑
它定义了整个应用程序使用的基本数据结构和接口
领域不变量在此处强制执行，与数据访问或存储方式无关
